focusPoints.label: What they're saying yes and no to
focusPoints.reason: Whether their current work still matches the team’s bets, or if they’ve drifted into firefighting.

focusPoints.label: Blockers and dependencies slowing delivery
focusPoints.reason: What’s most likely to be stuck between teams or decisions, so you can remove it before it turns into schedule risk.

focusPoints.label: How their updates land with stakeholders
focusPoints.reason: Whether stakeholders feel informed and decisions are getting made with the right context, not just status.

focusPoints.label: Workload and capacity over the last two weeks
focusPoints.reason: How sustainable their pace is right now, including interrupt load and whether they’re protecting their focus time effectively.
